title: Cyclanthera eremocarpa
taxonomy: Cyclanthera eremocarpa is classified in the kingdom Plantae, belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae. This family includes various types of gourds and melons. The genus Cyclanthera is known for its unique fruit characteristics. Within the family Cucurbitaceae, Cyclanthera eremocarpa is further classified as a type of annual vine. Its classification reflects its botanical relationship to other cucurbit species.
